sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = subtractMinutes(event_time, 15) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, subtractMinutes(event_time, 45) AS new_event_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, subtractMinutes(toDate('2024-01-01'), 20) AS new_date FROM test_dates;
